Full website audit — rkiza.com | March 2026
⚠️
Executive Summary
Rkiza.com has a genuine product niche in building materials, plumbing, and electrical supplies with real brand differentiation. However, the site suffers from critical SEO gaps, weak conversion architecture, thin product content, and absent trust signals — suppressing an estimated 60–75% of potential revenue.

🎯
Local SEO Golden Opportunity
None of the main competitors have claimed Al-Qassim / Unayzah / Buraydah local SEO keywords. With 3–4 location-specific pages and a verified Google Business Profile, Rkiza can dominate local search results within 60–90 days.

💼
Consultant's Final Note
Rkiza.com sits at a critical inflection point. The two highest-leverage initiatives are: (1) Fix SEO architecture — URL slugs, schema markup, and 10 content articles; and (2) Rebuild product pages with specs, multiple images, and reviews. These alone could double organic traffic and triple the conversion rate within 6 months. The B2B opportunity represents 3–5× higher average order value and is entirely untapped. Estimated revenue impact of full roadmap: 2.5–4× growth within 12 months.
